items.title: All Alone on an Alien Planet, Perseverance Rover is Photographed as a Tiny Green Speck in a Sea of Red
items.summary: Humans on Earth may have just run a marathon in under two hours for the first time, but it has taken the Mars Perseverance Rover 1,890 Martian sols -- or five years and four months in Earth time -- to…

items.title: Meta Launches Cheaper Smart Glasses Without Ray-Ban, Starting at $299
items.summary: Meta announced a new line of AI smart glasses, designed in-house without Ray-Ban, starting at a lower price of $299. [Read More]

items.title: Only One Photographer Captured Infamous Zidane Headbutt at World Cup Final 20 Years Ago

items.title: Less Than a Quarter of Americans Use AI to Create or Edit Images
items.summary: According to a new study from Pew Research, only 24% of Americans use AI for creating and editing images or videos. [Read More]
